# causal-field

> Gaussian resource-contention fields for multi-agent AI coordination

## What it does
Replaces hard mutex locks with probabilistic Gaussian interference fields.
Agents project splats into a shared latent space. Overlapping splats signal
contention before conflict occurs so agents can defer without blocking.

## Use cases
- Multi-agent LLM systems: coordinate write access to shared resources
- Agentic AI pipelines: soft-lock files, database rows, API endpoints
- MCP server coordination: prevent write contention between concurrent agents
- Research: probabilistic resource allocation inspired by 3D Gaussian Splatting
- Replacing threading.Lock in cooperative async systems

## Key concepts
- Splat: Gaussian projection representing agent resource intent
- Soft acquire: probabilistic lock that checks interference before granting
- Interference: sum of Gaussian contributions at a resource coordinate
- Adaptive sigma: splat spread self-calibrates based on collision history

## Install
pip install causal-field

## Quick use
from causal_field import CausalField, render_ascii
field = CausalField(dim=64)
field.soft_acquire("agent-A", "file_write:/data/output.csv")
result = field.soft_acquire("agent-B", "file_write:/data/output.csv")
print(render_ascii(field))

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/brokenbartender/causal-field
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/causal-field/
- Homepage: https://lexipro.online
